engine.ladder_reasoning: Studio sells defined expertise (strategy, branding, digital, communication) and leans on manifesto, process pillars, team bios and personality to earn trust in the firm; portfolio supports but is not the whole argument.

goal.one_action: book a consultation / contact the studio about a project

structure.archetype_note: Agency/studio site: manifesto + services + case studies + team/process, contact via consultation form; contact is an in-page anchor rather than a standalone route.

mapped.observed_as: Oto, co możemy dla Ciebie zrobić
Oto, jak to robimy / Koherencja, Rezonans, Funkcjonalność
Poznaj zespół / Nie wahaj się odezwać
Jesteśmy mili. Ale nie za mili.
Gotowi do startu? / Zbudujmy razem markę...
Znajdź coś do poczytania / Zobacz, co o tym piszemy (blog teaser)

unmapped.observed: Chcesz dołączyć do zespołu? — Aplikuj (recruitment/careers CTA)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A jobs/hiring call directed at a job-seeker audience, not a customer conversion; no canonical section expresses careers recruitment

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; five pages captured with clear section order, CTAs, forms and proof counts.

gap_findings: Site carries several co-equal conversion actions the single-goal model can't fully hold: consultation/contact form, newsletter subscribe, and a careers 'Aplikuj' recruitment CTA — the recruitment path targets a job-seeker audience, not a customer.
Manifesto section is a studio-philosophy statement that maps only loosely to founderNote; a dedicated 'manifesto/positioning statement' section would fit agency archetypes better.
